topic: canopy management, vigour, and bunch exposure
trigger_keywords: poda en verde durante la fase de crecimiento de la vid
controlar el vigor y mejorar la exposición de los racimos
técnica en la viña es esencial en Sancerre para controlar el vigor
qué se busca con el manejo del dosel

steps.label: cause
steps.text: Shoots and leaves are managed during the growing season through canopy operations.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Removing or positioning growth limits canopy density and improves light penetration and airflow around bunches.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: Vigour is controlled and bunch exposure and ripening conditions become more balanced.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: Vigour is controlled and bunch exposure and ripening conditions become more balanced.
